User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents the user's progress and stats in the mission.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user (Firebase UID).

unlockedPowers.description: List of IDs of unlocked AI powers.

currentMissionIndex.description: The index of the current active mission.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

companyId.description: The ID of the company this user belongs to.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user is an admin for their company.

missionProgress.description: A map of mission IDs to their progress data (cards, explanation, etc).

lastActive.description: The last time the user was active.

AllowedEmail.title: Allowed Email
AllowedEmail.description: An email address whitelisted for a specific company.

Company.title: Company Profile
Company.description: Represents a company using the system.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles indexed by UID.

/companies/{companyId}/whitelist/{emailI.description: Sub-collection of whitelisted emails for a company.
